title: CARE framework gray-zone counter-strategy + red-team critique

fields.vision: This is the original-framework counterpart to the Russia assessment writing sample — a short submission-grade paper that proposes a new analytic framework ("Counter-Ambiguity and Reflexive Erosion", acronym CARE) for undermining Russian gray-zone advantage.
fields.mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
fields.source_utilization: Strategy, war, deterrence, and national-security policy. Use as the strategic-studies spine for national-security and wargaming pages. Vision: Frame national-security pages around strategy, restraint, military organization, and conflict termination rather than generic security language. Mechanism: Extract escalation, war termination, defense cooperation, military integration, global command, and non-military warfare mechanisms. Plan: Close-read Book I, wargaming, defense-politics, crisis, and national-security pages before status upgrades. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact passages for restraint, escalation, and institutional decision mechanisms. Source pool: 136 deduplicated local title candidates; 151 catalogue support rows. Examples: Peace and War; Handbook of Defence Politics. Intelligence tradecraft, counterintelligence, and analytic method. Use source library intelligence titles as method authority and intelligence-domain stressors. Vision: Present intelligence pages as disciplined analytic-method and tradecraft demonstrations. Mechanism: Tie claims to collection, covert action, deception, interrogation, bias-control, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Prioritize Capstone, SATS, CI, RAG integrity, and analyst-assurance pages for close-reading. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need method-passage extraction and claim-to-source linkage. Source pool: 60 deduplicated local title candidates; 63 catalogue support rows. Examples: Improving Intelligence Analysis; Leading Intelligence Analysis. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows...
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. When to reach for this: preparing an original-framework writing sample for IC applications; drafting a short paper that proposes a counter-strategy concept; red-teaming an own draft before submission (the 04 file is reusable as a generic critique template); teaching the Observed/Inferred/Proposed discipline to colleagues or students. Entry point: README.txt — 02_framework_summary_one_page.md (to grasp the thesis) — 01_final_essay.md (the work product itself) — 04_red_team_critique.md (to stress-test). Integration target: federal application writing-sample attachment; IC-adjacent research portfolio; teaching example for analytic originality under discipline. Wire or preserve the implementation files: None.
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
fields.detailed_source_vision: This is the original-framework counterpart to the Russia assessment writing sample — a short submission-grade paper that proposes a new analytic framework ("Counter-Ambiguity and Reflexive Erosion", acronym CARE) for undermining Russian gray-zone advantage. Where russia_intelligence_analysis_final_handoff.zip demonstrates descriptive-integrative analytic maturity, this packet demonstrates the distinct competency of generating an original concept under discipline — inventing a framework that is narrow, plausible, operationally literate, and defensible in red-team cross-examination. The packet's thesis: Russian gray-zone operations derive disproportionate value from ambiguity, deniability, and manipulated hesitation. Rather than symmetrical retaliation, a superior U.S. response should systematically Collapse ambiguity, Attribute via fused operational function, Reverse the cost logic of manipulation, and Erode the support architecture that sustains...
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: This is the original-framework counterpart to the Russia assessment writing sample — a short submission-grade paper that proposes a new analytic framework ("Counter-Ambiguity and Reflexive Erosion", acronym CARE) for undermining Russian gray-zone advantage.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It makes adversarial language and influence mechanisms inspectable by separating phrase, channel, target perception, amplification path, and judgment effect.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: blueprint detailed source fields.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.
